nasb.text: And it came about at that time, that Judah departed from his brothers and visited a certain Adullamite, whose name was Hirah.

esv.text: It happened at that time that Judah went down from his brothers and turned aside to a certain Adullamite, whose name was Hirah.

cnv.text: 那時，猶大離開他的眾兄弟下去，到一個亞杜蘭人的家裡居住，那人名叫希拉。

ccb.text: 那时，犹大离开了他的兄弟们，到亚杜兰人希拉的家里住。

csbs.text: 在那段时期，犹大离开他的兄弟们，下到一个名叫希拉的亚杜兰人那里，在附近支搭帐篷。
